description_long: This is a dark bronze or metal bust sculpture depicting the head and upper torso of an older man with short, combed hair and a collared shirt. The facial features are detailed, with pronounced cheekbones, a defined nose, and a subtle smile, giving the figure a dignified and approachable expression. The surface of the sculpture is textured, with visible tool marks and a matte finish that adds depth to the facial features and hair. The bust is mounted on a rectangular plinth base, which provides stability and a formal presentation. The back of the head and shoulders are less detailed, focusing on the overall shape rather than fine features. The sculpture is likely intended for public display in an urban or park setting, serving as a commemorative or decorative piece.
description: A dark, textured bust of an older man with detailed facial features and a collared shirt, mounted on a rectangular base. The sculpture has a dignified expression and a matte, rough finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man's detailed facial features, including eyes, nose, mouth, and the collar of his shirt.
description_view_1: Left profile view highlighting the side of the face, ear, and the textured hair, with the nose and chin in silhouette.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head and shoulders, with less detail and a focus on the overall form.
description_view_3: Right profile view similar to the left, showing the ear, side of the face, and the collar, with the facial features in profile.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
